name: masterclaude
description: MASTER CLAUDE — a free, open-source Claude Code team: a conductor that assembles Sentinel plus planning, review, and guardrail specialists for your project.

plugins.name: master-claude
plugins.description: Say "master claude": the conductor interviews you, maps your project, and assembles a tailored team (Sentinel the cartographer + planning, review, and guardrail skills) — free, local, no vault.
